signal.title: EV battery supply chain event candidate
signal.summary: Major battery manufacturer announced new solid-state battery production timeline. Supply chain names may see momentum if confirmed by order data.

evidence.quote_or_data: Solid-state pilot line Q3 2026, volume production target 2027
Upstream material suppliers confirming order pipeline expansion

signal.suggested_action: Enter watch pool; await Q3 production milestone confirmation
signal.trigger_condition: Company confirms pilot line yield > 80% in Q3 earnings call
signal.invalidation_condition: Competitor achieves volume production first or capex guidance cut
signal.risk_note: Solid-state timeline has slipped before. Estimated data quality on supply chain checks.
